recommendations.title: Text for You
recommendations.overview: Sports writer Mark is baffled when he receives romantic text messages on his cell phone. What he does not know: His new number once belonged to the deceased boyfriend of Clara, who continues to send text messages in order to cope with the loss. When

recommendations.title: The Little Witch
recommendations.overview: The little witch is only 127 years old – too young for the annual coven of witches. Although she is not yet old enough to be a real witch she wants to become a really good one. This decision causes trouble inside her magic world.

recommendations.title: Girls on Top
recommendations.overview: The adventures of three teenage girls - Inken, Vicky and Lena - and their quest to have their first orgasm.

recommendations.title: Every Day
recommendations.overview: 16-year old Rhiannon falls in love with a mysterious spirit named “A” that inhabits a different body every day. Feeling an unmatched connection, Rhiannon and “A” work each day to find each other, not knowing what the next day will bring.

recommendations.title: The Worst Person in the World
recommendations.overview: The chronicles of four years in the life of Julie, a young woman who navigates the troubled waters of her love life and struggles to find her career path, leading her to take a realistic look at who she really is.

recommendations.title: Suck Me Shakespeer 2
recommendations.overview: A rowdy teacher accompanies a class trip to Thailand to recover some diamonds accidentally sent there and restore the school's reputation.

recommendations.title: La Notte
recommendations.overview: A day in the life of an unfaithful married couple and their steadily deteriorating relationship in Milan.

recommendations.title: Hannah and Her Sisters
recommendations.overview: Between two Thanksgivings, Hannah's husband falls in love with her sister Lee, while her hypochondriac ex-husband rekindles his relationship with her sister Holly.

recommendations.title: Devil Between the Legs
recommendations.overview: Mexico City. Every day, Beatriz is insulted and humiliated by her jealous husband, but she does not flee his side because they have created a codependency and, at least for her, she would not conceive of her life any other way: by dint of feeling hum

recommendations.title: Passion
recommendations.overview: The rivalry between the manipulative boss of an advertising agency and her talented protégée escalates from stealing credit to public humiliation to murder.
